title: chassalia lurida
intro: Chassalia lurida, also known as the Yellow Chassalia or Chassalia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical forests of Malaysia and Thailand. It belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Chassalia lurida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and stems can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
